title: hedeoma pulegioides
intro: Hedeoma pulegioides, also known as American pennyroyal or American mint, is a perennial herb native to North America that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a digestive aid, relieve headaches and fever, and as a natural insect repellent. The health benefits of hedeoma pulegioides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. Hedeoma pulegioides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used as a culinary herb to add flavor to food.
